title: endiandra multiflora
intro: Endiandra multiflora, also known as the 'Many-flowered Endiandra', is a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Endiandra multiflora include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. The plant is typically prepared as an infusion or decoction, and its leaves can also be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and salves.
